title: French Almond Halwa
description: A French-inspired dessert made with Indian-style halwa, almonds, and a touch of silky sweetness.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut the dough into desired shapes and sizes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the halwa mix, almonds, and melted ghee or butter.
Place a spoonful of the halwa mixture onto each pastry shape.
Fold the pastry over the filling to form a triangle or square shape.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow to cool completely before dusting with powdered sugar and serving.
